subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy recent letter was perused, and it brought glad tidings of the steadfastness and uprising of the loved ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان تحریر اخیر ملاحظه گردید بشارت قیام و استقامت احباء الله داشت
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @hospitality, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
